companies.name: Finabeo
companies.description: Enterprise consulting firm specialising in cloud cost management (FinOps) and safe agentic AI transformation, with a human-led, governance-first approach for regulated industries.
companies.voice: professional, authoritative, governance-aware — speaks to CIOs and enterprise IT decision makers

services.name: Cloud Cost Management
services.description: Enterprise FinOps consulting with custom tools to identify waste and optimize cloud spending
benefits: 25-40% cloud cost savings in first year
ROI within 3-6 months
Tailored recommendations addressing business strategy
Read-only cloud access without PII exposure
services.keyDifferentiator: Human-led, Tech-driven approach with governance focus

services.name: Agentic AI Transformation
services.description: Safe, human-in-the-loop workflow automation for enterprise process transformation
benefits: Seamless technology integration
Enterprise process transformation
Real-time data integration
Multi-agent orchestration with human oversight

companies.name: Brigade Electronics
companies.description: Global manufacturer of vehicle safety systems for commercial vehicles, fleets, and off-highway machinery — including camera monitor systems, AI vision detection, ultrasonic sensors, and white-sound reversing alarms used by transport, construction, mining, and emergency services.
companies.voice: practical, safety-first, evidence-led — speaks to fleet managers, safety officers, and transport operations leaders

services.name: Camera Monitor Systems (Backeye, Sidescan View)
services.description: 360° camera monitoring solutions giving drivers live video of every blind spot — including the Backeye 360, side cameras, and HD digital recording for incident review.
benefits: Eliminate blind spots around large vehicles and machinery
Reduce reversing and side-swipe collisions
Provide indisputable video evidence for insurance claims
Compliant with FORS, CLOCS, and DVS Progressive Safe System standards
services.targetCustomerSize: Fleet operators with 10+ commercial vehicles, construction firms with HGV/plant fleets
services.keyDifferentiator: Purpose-built for commercial vehicles, ruggedised for harsh environments, integrates with telematics

services.name: AI Vision Detection (Backsense Radar & Predictive AI)
services.description: Predictive AI vision and radar-based obstacle detection that identifies vulnerable road users (cyclists, pedestrians) in real time and alerts the driver before collisions occur.
benefits: Active warnings, not just passive video — driver gets alerted
Distinguishes humans from static objects to reduce false alarms
Works in all weather and lighting conditions
Helps meet TfL Direct Vision Standard and Vision Zero targets
services.targetCustomerSize: Operators of HGVs, refuse trucks, construction plant, and forklifts
services.keyDifferentiator: Combines radar + AI vision for the most accurate vulnerable road user detection on the market

services.name: Reversing Alarms & Ultrasonic Sensors (bbs-tek White Sound)
services.description: Industry-leading bbs-tek white sound reversing alarms (locatable, multi-frequency, instantly directional) and ultrasonic obstacle detection for low-speed manoeuvring.
benefits: Locatable sound — pedestrians know exactly where the danger is
Reduces noise complaints vs. traditional tonal alarms (BS EN 7010 compliant)
Self-adjusting volume responds to ambient noise
Ultrasonic sensors detect obstacles within 3m and warn driver
services.targetCustomerSize: Any operator of commercial vehicles or off-highway machinery — single vehicle to large fleet
services.keyDifferentiator: Patented white sound technology, 3-year warranty, used by emergency services and military worldwide
